limitations: This diagnostic validates metric and data-flow plumbing only. It cannot distinguish retrieval methods because every synthetic trajectory terminates exactly at its declared target.
RGB frames are synthetic colour-gradient placeholders — not real camera images.
6 episodes is a local diagnostic run, not the full VLNVerse Track B benchmark.
Instructions were authored for this dataset; independent benchmark annotation not established.
All episodes are from the train split and were used during development.
Retrieval metrics evaluate language-to-image grounding only.
Results do not prove GNM navigation success.
Oracle retrieval removes retrieval error but does not establish closed-loop navigation performance.
Full language-conditioned navigation requires retrieval followed by GNM rollout and stopping evaluation.
navigation_separation_statement: Current retrieval metrics evaluate language-to-image grounding only. They do not prove GNM navigation success. Oracle retrieval removes retrieval error but does not establish closed-loop navigation performance. Full language-conditioned navigation requires retrieval followed by actual GNM rollout and stopping criterion evaluation. Retrieval success and navigation success must not be combined into a single claim unless both stages are executed for the same episode.

oracle.rsr_formula: n_success / n_episodes  where success := ree_m <= threshold_m

last.rsr_formula: n_success / n_episodes  where success := ree_m <= threshold_m
